title: ‘How Dare You Provoke Voters?’ Bengal Cop’s Fiery Warning to TMC Worker Sparks Row Over ‘Fake VVPAT’ Claim
description: A viral video from Krishnaganj, Nadia district, shows a heated confrontation between a police officer and a Trinamool Congress (TMC) worker during Phase 2 polling in West Bengal. The officer accused the worker of attempting to influence voters and carrying suspicious documents near EVMs. The incident has intensified concerns over voter intimidation and election transparency as Bengal awaits results on May 4.
